name: Servicios Profesionales
description: Agencias, consultoras, firmas de servicios B2B o B2C: marketing, legal, contabilidad, salud, educación, diseño, consultoría de management, y cualquier negocio cuyo producto principal sea un servicio intangible.

biz_evaluator.context: Evaluate service business viability: billable hour economics vs productized services, talent acquisition and retention constraints, geographic scalability (local vs remote-first), and client concentration risk.

brand_guardian.context: Professional services brand: thought leadership positioning, founder and partner personal brand as trust signals, credentials and case studies as brand equity, and authority markers (media mentions, speaking engagements, certifications).

growth_hacker.context: Service business growth: content marketing (blog, podcast, speaking engagements), referral and partner programs, LinkedIn thought leadership funnel, productized service landing pages, and community-led growth.

marketing_strategist.context: Service marketing: inbound lead generation through content and SEO, case study and testimonial development, webinars and workshops as lead magnets, and niche specialization as a core positioning strategy.

sales_lead.context: Consultative sales: structured discovery call frameworks, proposal and SOW development, scoping engagements to avoid scope creep, contract negotiation, and optimizing the retainer vs project revenue mix.

cfo_finance.context: Service firm economics: utilization and realization rates, average billing rate vs fully-loaded cost per hour, revenue per headcount benchmarks, and the strategic transition from time-based to value-based pricing.

legal_expert.context: Service agreements: SOW and MSA structures, IP ownership clauses (work-for-hire vs retained IP), confidentiality and NDA requirements, liability caps and professional indemnity insurance, and non-compete/non-solicitation clauses.

customer_success.context: Client retention and expansion: structured Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), proactive communication cadence, expanding scope of engagement, measuring and communicating ROI delivered, and systematizing referral generation from satisfied clients.

competitor_analyst.context: Service competitive positioning: niche vs generalist firm trade-offs, pricing benchmarks by service tier, talent and capability differentiation, geographic competitive dynamics, and partnership vs competition decisions with adjacent firms.
